summary: Iteration 221 — P0.15: Dipendenze dinamiche tra domande e requisiti. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: 10/10 features verified after fix. Key findings: Backend applicabilita engine works correctly (zincatura negative → 2 NO_GALVANIZING items, montaggio negative → 5 NO_INSTALLATION items). Frontend shows riepilogo pills, non-applicable items with reason codes, highlighted quick buttons. FIXED: Real-time applicability updates now working - added hasLocalChanges check to prioritize local calculation when user has unsaved changes.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: istr_701cc0cc1ddc with 3 domande_residue, all answered
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0.15 applicabilita engine fully working (backend + frontend). Real-time updates fixed - riepilogo pills and non-applicable items now update when user changes answers via quick buttons. To test commessa mista blocking: need to create istruttoria with 'commessa mista' question and answer 'Si, mista' - will get HTTP 409 on conferma. Test credentials: session_token=c87bbcfe2ef64f5c9e48c4cf73f7b2ff, istruttoria_id=istr_701cc0cc1ddc

backend_applicabilita_field.details: GET /api/istruttoria/{id} returns applicabilita with decisioni, items_non_applicabili, items_condizionali, blocchi_conferma, riepilogo

backend_zincatura_negative.details: Zincatura 'Nessun trattamento' → 2 items_non_applicabili with NO_GALVANIZING reason code

backend_montaggio_negative.details: Montaggio 'Non previsto' → 5 items_non_applicabili with NO_INSTALLATION reason code

backend_rispondi_returns_applicabilita.details: POST /api/istruttoria/{id}/rispondi returns applicabilita field with calculated values

frontend_riepilogo_pills.details: Riepilogo decisioni pills shown in Esito card (Zincatura: Non prevista, Montaggio: Previsto)

frontend_non_applicable_items.details: Non-applicable items shown with reason codes [NO_GALVANIZING]

frontend_quick_buttons_highlighted.details: Quick buttons highlighted (blue bg-blue-600) when matching saved answer

frontend_collapsible_tech_details.details: Collapsible tech details section works (toggle expands/collapses)

frontend_realtime_applicability.details: Real-time applicability updates now working after fix - riepilogo and non-applicable items update when user changes answers before saving. Added hasLocalChanges check to prioritize local calculation.

frontend_blocchi_conferma_card.details: Card blocchi conferma NOT shown (correct - no commessa mista in test data)
